questions: What are typical Google Ads benchmarks by industry?
How can we use benchmark CTR/CPA/CVR?
qa.answer: Benchmarks provide directional CTR, CPC, CVR, and CPA ranges by industry but vary widely by intent, brand share, and creative quality. Use as sanity checks, not targets.
implication: Compare your metrics to relevant industry/intent cohorts, not global medians.
Focus on incrementality and profit vs. chasing benchmark averages.
Use outliers to diagnose issues (mismatch, tracking, creative, landing page).
